# BP-98 negative: opened file is closed on the owning function path
lang: go
file: BP-98-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import "os"

func readConfig(path string) ([]byte, error) {
	f, err := os.Open(path)
	if err != nil {
		return nil, err
	}
	data := make([]byte, 16)
	_, err = f.Read(data)
	if closeErr := f.Close(); closeErr != nil {
		return nil, closeErr
	}
	return data, err
}
